zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Rumigny於1094年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼時，他的父親Nicolas de Rumigny40歲，母親Mathilde D'Avesnes29歲。他和Adelise de Hainault至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於大約1153年在比利時納姆爾福洛倫斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Rumigny于1094年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼时，他的父亲Nicolas de Rumigny40岁，母亲Mathilde D'Avesnes29岁。他和Adelise de Hainault至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于大约1153年在比利时納姆爾福洛倫斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Rumigny was born in 1094, in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Nicolas de Rumigny, was 40 and his mother, Mathilde D'Avesnes, was 29. He had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Adelise de Hainault. He died about 1153, in Florennes, Namur, Belgium, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Rumigny est né en 1094, à Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Nicolas de Rumigny, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mathilde D'Avesnes, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Adelise de Hainault. Il est décédé environ 1153, à Florennes, Namur, Belgique, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Rumigny 1094 in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas de Rumigny 40 und seine Mutter Mathilde D'Avesnes 29. Er hatte mit Adelise de Hainault mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1153 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Florennes, Namen, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Rumigny è nato il nel 1094 nel Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Nicolas de Rumigny, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde D'Avesnes, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Adelise de Hainault. Morì circa 1153, nel Florennes, Namur, Belgio, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Rumignyが1094年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスルミグニーで生まれた時，父Nicolas de Rumignyは40歳，母Mathilde D'Avesnesは29歳であった。彼はAdelise de Hainaultとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1153年にベルギーナムルフロアンスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Rumigny(이)가 1094년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 럼익니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas de Rumigny(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde D'Avesnes(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Adelise de Hainault(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1153년 벨기에 남어 플로렌스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Rumigny nasceu em 1094, em Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Nicolas de Rumigny, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde D'Avesnes, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Adelise de Hainault. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1153, em Florennes, Namur, Bélgica, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Rumigny родился в 1094 г. в местности румигни, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Nicolas de Rumigny было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde D'Avesnes, 29. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Adelise de Hainault. Он умер около 1153 г. в местности флореннесь, намур, Бельгия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Rumigny nació en 1094, en Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Nicolas de Rumigny, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mathilde D'Avesnes, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Adelise de Hainault. Murió aproximadamente 1153, en Florennes, Namur, Bélgica, a la edad de 60 años.
